history.content:
<thought>
The goal O is at the top-right area. My current position is at the bottom row, facing up. Directly ahead is lava (L), so I cannot move forward. To reach the goal, I need to go right twice and then up twice. I will turn clockwise to face right, then move forward.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front is floor (.), so it is safe to move forward. The goal is located two cells ahead and two cells to the left. After moving forward, I will need to turn left to head toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The goal is at (row5, col2) two rows up and two columns left. I am at (row7, col4) facing right. The cell directly ahead is a wall. The only safe adjacent cell is upward (floor). I will turn counter-clockwise to face upward, then later move forward.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am currently facing west. The goal is two rows up and one column to the right. To reach it, I need to go right (east) first to avoid the lava directly above me. I cannot move forward (west) because that leads away from the goal and eventually into a wall. I need to turn to face east. Since I can only turn 90 degrees per action, I will turn clockwise to face north first, then in the next step turn clockwise again to face east before moving.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am facing east. The cell ahead is a wall (#). The goal is to the left and up. To move north, I need to turn counter-clockwise to face north. Then I can move forward.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north, but the cell directly ahead is lava (L), so moving forward is impossible. The goal (O) is located two steps north and one step east of my current position. To reach it safely, I can move east first to (7,5), then go north twice. Therefore, I need to turn clockwise to face east.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am facing east, but the cell directly ahead is a wall (#). To reach the goal O located north-west, I need to first go north. I will turn counter-clockwise to face north, then move forward.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am facing north, but the cell directly ahead is lava (L). The goal is northeast of my position. The cell to my east is a safe floor cell. I can turn clockwise to face east, then move forward to that cell, and later go north toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am facing north, and the cell directly ahead is safe floor ('.'). The goal is located to the north-west. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal, allowing me to then turn west to reach it. Therefore, I should move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north, but the cell directly ahead is a wall (#). The goal O is located two cells to the left (west) of the agent. To move toward the goal, I need to turn counter-clockwise to face west. After turning, I can then move forward onto the floor cell adjacent to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
O objetivo está diretamente à frente (dois passos à minha frente na direção que estou enfrentando). A célula à minha frente é um piso seguro (.) e a célula seguinte é o objetivo (O). Não há lava ou parede no caminho. Portanto, posso avançar com segurança.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is two cells directly north of the agent. Currently I am facing west. To move toward the goal, I need to face north. Turning clockwise (GIRA_HORARIO) from west will make me face north, allowing me to move forward safely.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is immediately to the west (left) of the agent. The agent is currently facing east (due to the previous clockwise turn). To move onto the goal, I need to face west. Turning clockwise will change my orientation from east to south. This is the first step toward eventually facing west after another clockwise turn. I should not move forward because that would go east, away from the goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>
